column11:
The Bv2 series does not include temporary (local) storage, enabling lower cost difference and substantial price‑performance gains for workloads that do not require it. 
 Dldsv5 includes local SSD storage, which increases cost and A2v2. 
 Esv5 does not include local storage, resulting in a smaller cost increase. 
 Edsv5 includes local SSD storage, increasing cost 
 Dldsv5 introduces substantially more local SSD storage and higher performance characteristics, significantly increasing cost.
